title: EU tells Google to open up AI on Android; Google says that's "unwarranted intervention"
description: Gemini gets preferential treatment on Android, but maybe not for long (in Europe).

title: Google rolls out AI tool to predict flash floods up to 24 hours ahead
description: Google has launched a new AI‐powered Flood Hub designed to flag flash‐flood risk up to 24 hours in advance. Experts say the tool could add valuable warning time, but stress it works best alongside traditional forecasting.

title: AI Innovation In Beauty: Discover The Best Face Shape Detector Tools Of 2026

title: Italian archaeologists use AI to generate image of Pompeii victim for first time
description: It is based on the recent discovery of the remains of a male adult, just outside one of the southern gates of the city, lying next to a terracotta mortar that he presumably used as protection.
